dedupeStrategy: canonical platform name + website URL + submission URL; previously queued runs 23-33 were avoided

platforms.name: Radio Free Brooklyn Music Submission Form
platforms.country: United States / Brooklyn New York / independent community internet radio and global streaming audience
platforms.manualReviewReason: Form requires free downloadable music links, artist/contact fields, NYC availability questions and anti-spam validation; do not automate CAPTCHA or validation fields.

platforms.name: Worldwide FM Collaboration and New Voices Pitch Route
platforms.country: United Kingdom / London / global online radio platform and international curator network
platforms.manualReviewReason: Route is a general collaboration/contact form and business email; pitch relevance, rights, links and outreach copy need owner approval.

platforms.name: NTS Radio Show Proposal Audio-Link Route
platforms.country: United Kingdom / London and Manchester / global underground online radio audience
platforms.manualReviewReason: Show-proposal form accepts audio demo links but is not a direct music-submission queue; concept, rights and suitability need manual review.

platforms.name: WMSC 90.3 FM Music Director Review Route
platforms.country: United States / Montclair New Jersey / college radio, online stream and local music audience
platforms.manualReviewReason: Official Music Director routing exists, but protected contact links were not decoded and the pitch must be prepared manually.

platforms.name: WFUV 90.7 Music Department Physical Submission Route
platforms.country: United States / New York City / public radio, AAA music discovery and global web audience
platforms.manualReviewReason: WFUV asks to send music by snail mail to the Music Department; physical mailing, packaging and follow-up require owner approval.
